narrative:
Circleville 1-B (precinct in Pickaway County) has 644 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.4%, a clear Republican lean of 11.8 percentage points.
